blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 10".
